ce-bb-uShow-g.SA1: If used to defeat an opponent, gain 2 random BUFFS for 10/12/15 seconds.

do-bb-array-g.name: Megalith Array
do-bb-array-g.SA1: Reduces the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER by 3/4/5% per landed HIT.

do-bb-beast-g.name: Beast Of Gehenna
do-bb-beast-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance to set opponent's SPECIAL MOVE and TAG INS on COOLDOWN

do-bb-cLives-g.name: Catellite Lives
do-bb-cLives-g.SA1: 2/3/5% chance on HIT to remove all BUFFS.

do-bb-gun-g.name: Gun Blades
do-bb-gun-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED and HEAL BLOCK for 10 seconds.

do-bb-legion-g.name: Nightmare Legion
do-bb-legion-g.SA1: If used to defeat an opponent, gain 3 random BUFF(S) for 10/12/15 seconds.

do-bb-wagon-g.name: Bandwagon Rushdown
do-bb-wagon-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict HEX for 10 seconds.

el-bb-khep-g.name: Khepri Sun
el-bb-khep-g.SA1: Deal 25/35/50% bonus damage if the opponent is suffering a DEBUFF.

el-bb-lady-g.name: Lady of Slaughter
el-bb-lady-g.SA1: 50/75/100% chance to inflict a random DEBUFF for 10 seconds and set the opponent's SPECIAL MOVES and TAG INS on COOLDOWN.

el-bb-nekh-g.name: Nekhbet Breaker
el-bb-nekh-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 8 seconds.

el-bb-sBite-g.name: Sekhmet's Bite
el-bb-sBite-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK and CURSE for 10 seconds.

el-bb-sFury-g.name: Sekhmet's Fury
el-bb-sFury-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to gain ENRAGE and HASTE for 10 seconds.

el-bb-sTurn-g.name: Sekhmet's Turn
el-bb-sTurn-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED and HEALBLOCK for 10 seconds.

fi-bb-fenrir-g.name: Fenrir Drive
fi-bb-fenrir-g.SA1: 25/35/50% bonus damage if opponent has a BLEED effect.

fi-bb-gregor-g.name: Gregor Samson
fi-bb-gregor-g.SA1: 10/15/20% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 5 seconds.

fi-bb-temper-g.name: Drill Tempered
fi-bb-temper-g.SA1: 5/10/15% chance on HIT to remove all BUFFS.

fi-bb-tricho-g.name: Trichobezoar
fi-bb-tricho-g.SA1: 15/25/35% bonus damage if opponent is in the air.

fi-bb-widow-g.name: Widow's Peak
fi-bb-widow-g.SA1: 50/75/100% chance on HIT to inflict CRIPPLE and ARMOR BREAK for 10 seconds.

fu-bb-drill-g.name: Drill of My Dreams
fu-bb-drill-g.SA1: Deals 2/5/8% bonus damage per COMBO HIT.

fu-bb-friend-g.name: Best Friends Forever!
fu-bb-friend-g.SA1: 15/20/25% chance on HIT to transfer all DEBUFFS to the opponent and all opponent BUFFS to yourself.

fu-bb-hHeels-g.name: Head over Heels
fu-bb-hHeels-g.SA1: Deals an additional 5/10/15% damage for every 10% HEALTH missing from Fukua.

fu-bb-kiss-g.name: Goodnight Kiss
fu-bb-kiss-g.SA1: 10/15/25% chance on HIT to inflict WITHER and FATIGUE for 10 seconds each.

fu-bb-snugg-g.name: Inevitable Snuggle
fu-bb-snugg-g.SA1: Gain 1/2/3 stack(s) of MIASMA for 10 seconds if used to defeat an opponent.
fu-bb-snugg-g.SA2: 50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

fu-bb-tShy-g.name: Twice Shy
fu-bb-tShy-g.SA1: Deals 25/35/50% bonus damage if the opponent is above 50% HEALTH.
fu-bb-tShy-g.SA2: 50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

ma-bb-carpal-g.name: Carpal Pummel
ma-bb-carpal-g.SA1: SKELETAL SUMMON: 20/35% chance on HIT to inflict STUN for 3/4 seconds. UNBLOCKABLE if the opponent is suffering from QUIETUS.

ma-bb-hilgard-g.name: Hilgard's Howl
ma-bb-hilgard-g.SA1: SKELETAL SUMMON: 35% chance on HIT to inflict QUIETUS for 10/12/15 seconds.

ma-bb-hoover-g.name: Hoover Maneuver
ma-bb-hoover-g.SA1: 25/35/50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

ma-bb-repetitive-g.name: Repetitive Skeleton Impact
ma-bb-repetitive-g.SA1: SKELETAL SUMMON: Inflicts INVERSE POLARITY for 10/12/15 seconds on HIT. Deals 50% bonus damage if CHARGED.

ma-bb-scrub-g.name: Scrub 'n' Smash
ma-bb-scrub-g.SA1: 25/50/75% chance on HIT to remove all BUFFS.

ma-bb-weight-g.name: Weight of our Will
ma-bb-weight-g.SA1: Reduces the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER by 2/3/4% per landed HIT.

mf-bb-dMemb-g.name: Fifth of Dismember
mf-bb-dMemb-g.SA1: Deals 50/75/100% bonus damage if the opponent is below 50% HEALTH. Sacrifices 25% of your current HEALTH.

mf-bb-edge-g.name: Feral Edge
mf-bb-edge-g.SA1: Deals additional damage equal to 5/7/10% of the opponent's MAX HEALTH if the final hit is a CRITICAL HIT.

mf-bb-fever-g.name: Cat Scratch Fever
mf-bb-fever-g.SA1: Deals 3/5/8% bonus damage per COMBO HIT and inflicts DEATH MARK for 10 seconds (also applies on BLOCK).

mf-bb-omnom-g.name: OMNOMNOM
mf-bb-omnom-g.SA1: 25/35/50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

mf-bb-paws-g.name: Hit Paws
mf-bb-paws-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT inflict BLEED for 5 seconds.

pa-bb-canopy-g.name: Canopy Bounce
pa-bb-canopy-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to remove all BUFFS.

pa-bb-iBrig-g.name: Inferno Brigade
pa-bb-iBrig-g.SA1: 50/75/100% bonus damage while at least 3 TEARS are active.

pa-bb-mBrig-g.name: Motor Brigade
pa-bb-mBrig-g.SA1: 15/25% chance on HIT to STUN opponent for 4/6 seconds.

pa-bb-scope-g.name: Silent Scope
pa-bb-scope-g.SA1: Has a 15/25/35% increased chance to land a CRITICAL HIT.

pe-bb-airport-g.name: Deadly Airport
pe-bb-airport-g.SA1: 15/25% chance on HIT to inflict HEAVY BLEED for 5/10 seconds.

pe-bb-argus-g.name: Argus Agony
pe-bb-argus-g.SA1: 5/10% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 3/5 seconds.

pe-bb-doom-g.name: Impending Doom
pe-bb-doom-g.SA1: 15/25% chance on HIT to STUN opponent for 4/6 seconds.

pe-bb-fellow-g.name: Good Fellows
pe-bb-fellow-g.SA1: 5/10% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 5/8 seconds.

pe-bb-lenny-g.name: Lonesome Lenny
pe-bb-lenny-g.SA1: On HIT, inflict 1/2/3 random DEBUFF(S) for 10 seconds.

pe-bb-wagon-g.name: Bandwagon Rushdown
pe-bb-wagon-g.SA1: 15/25/35% chance on HIT to remove all BUFFS.

pw-bb-bOver-g.name: Buer Overdrive
pw-bb-bOver-g.SA1: Reduces the opponent's BLOCKBUSTER METER by 3/5/7% per landed HIT.

pw-bb-crawl-g.name: Death Crawl
pw-bb-crawl-g.SA1: 5/10% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 3/6 seconds.

pw-bb-instal-g.name: Hatred Install
pw-bb-instal-g.SA1: 25/50/100% chance on HIT to gain ENRAGE for 10 seconds.

pw-bb-reaper-g.name: Fracture Reaper
pw-bb-reaper-g.SA1: 15/20/25% chance on HIT to inflict DEATH MARK for 10 seconds.

pw-bb-thresh-g.name: Buer Thresher
pw-bb-thresh-g.SA1: 15/25% chance on HIT to inflict ARMOR BREAK for 5/10 seconds.

rf-bb-battery-g.name: ASSAULT BATTERY
rf-bb-battery-g.SA1: 10/15/20% chance on HIT to inflict POWER SURGE for 10 seconds.

rf-bb-break-g.name: CIRCUIT BREAKER
rf-bb-break-g.SA1: While in detonation mode, HITS reduce BLOCKBUSTER METER by 5/7/10%.

rf-bb-canonA-g.name: CATASTROPHE CANNON ALPHA
rf-bb-canonA-g.SA1: CRITICAL HITS inflict WITHER for 5/7/10 seconds.

rf-bb-canonO-g.name: CATASTROPHE CANNON OMEGA
rf-bb-canonO-g.SA1: 2/3/5% chance on HIT to REMOVE 1 opponent BUFF and deal an additional 2% HEALTH for each BUFF removed. Defeated opponents cannot be revived.

rf-bb-magnet-g.name: MAGNETIC TRAP
rf-bb-magnet-g.SA1: 25/35/50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH. Gain BARRIER for 10 seconds on HIT.

sq-bb-bat-g.name: Battle Opera
sq-bb-bat-g.SA1: 25% chance on HIT to inflict WITHER for 5/7/10 seconds.

sq-bb-dai-g.name: Daisy Pusher
sq-bb-dai-g.SA1: Deals 25/35/50% bonus damage to opponents who are below 25% HEALTH.

sq-bb-dnd-g.name: Drag 'n' Drop
sq-bb-dnd-g.SA1: On HIT, inflict ARMOR BREAK for 5/7/10 seconds.

sq-bb-inf-g.name: Inferno of Leviathan
sq-bb-inf-g.SA1: 25% chance on HIT to inflict WITHER and HEAL BLOCK for 5/7/10 seconds.

sq-bb-rod-g.name: Rage of the Dragon
sq-bb-rod-g.SA2: Deals 50% bonus damage if used when below 10% HEALTH.

um-bb-acid-g.name: Acid Reflux
um-bb-acid-g.SA1: 50% chance on HIT to inflict SLIME for 10/12/15 seconds.

um-bb-feed-g.name: Feeding Time
um-bb-feed-g.SA1: 25/35/50% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH. Defeated opponents cannot be revived.

um-bb-project-g.name: Projection Lens
um-bb-project-g.SA1: 10/15/20% chance on HIT to inflict POWER SURGE for 10 seconds.

um-bb-rush-g.name: Hungern Rush
um-bb-rush-g.SA1: 15/20/25% bonus damage if used while OVERSTUFFED.

um-bb-tongue-g.name: Tongue Twister
um-bb-tongue-g.SA1: 35% chance on HIT to inflict SLIME for 10/12/15 seconds.
um-bb-tongue-g.SA2: 35% of the damage dealt is regained as HEALTH.

um-bb-under-g.name: Under The Weather
um-bb-under-g.SA1: 25% chance on HIT if used while RAVENOUS to inflict WITHER for 5/7/10 seconds.

va-bb-check-g.name: Checkmate Incision
va-bb-check-g.SA1: 25/35/50% chance on HIT to inflict BLEED for 5 seconds.

va-bb-countA-g.name: Countervenom: Sedative
va-bb-countA-g.SA1: Reduces opponent BLOCKBUSTER METER by 15/25/35% on HIT.

va-bb-countB-g.name: Countervenom: Detox
va-bb-countB-g.SA1: 15/25/35% chance on HIT to remove all BUFFS.

va-bb-countO-g.name: Countervenom: Paralysis
va-bb-countO-g.SA1: 15/25/35% chance on HIT to STUN opponent for 5 seconds.

va-bb-dOA-g.name: Dead On Arrival
va-bb-dOA-g.SA1: If used to defeat an opponent, gain HEAVY REGEN for 10/12/15 seconds.

va-bb-eKG-g.name: EKG Flatliner
va-bb-eKG-g.SA1: 25/35/50% bonus damage if opponent is suffering BLEED.

va-bb-forbid-g.name: Forbidden Procedure
va-bb-forbid-g.SA1: When HITTING the body of a fallen teammate, RESURRECT them with {0:P0} HEALTH.

va-bb-laryng-g.name: Laryngectomy
va-bb-laryng-g.SA1: 10/15/20% chance on HIT to inflict HEAVY BLEED for 10 seconds.
